audit_items.proof_trace: nfp_abm_qdisc_offload_stop makes zero dynamic memory allocations: it only issues a conditional warning, performs a type check, and zeroes fields in red.band[], which is a fixed-size inline array (band[MAX_DPs]) embedded directly in struct nfp_qdisc — not a pointer to heap memory. The formal assertion is vacuously true over an empty allocation set.
